note: Idle economy for Voxelheim, GROUNDED in references/idle_deconstruction.md (Clicker Heroes ~x1.55/encounter HP, boss x10; Tap Titans 2 1.57^stage; prestige from accumulated progress with a fractional scale + flat %/unit per Hero Souls; Pecorella: reset at +50-200%). First-pass numbers, to tune by playtest + game-design critic.

monster.scaling_note: per-stage step (10 same-HP kills/stage); steepened from 1.15 toward the refs' ~1.55/encounter so the climb reads as idle number-go-up. gold grows just under HP so upgrades stay meaningful.

prestige.label: Return to the valley
prestige.formula_note: fractional exponent (was super-linear ^1.5, wrong direction) so each prestige grants ~+50-200% more shards (Pecorella); modeled on Clicker Heroes (souls from accumulated progress) not a super-linear stage power.

ftue.beat1: Your hero fights on its own - watch the gold pile up.
ftue.beat2: Tap Sword to upgrade - hit harder, kill faster.
ftue.beat3: Push as far as you can. When it slows, Prestige for a permanent boost.
